scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @podchody/server" "npm run dev -w @podchody/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @podchody/web && npm run build -w @podchody/server
scripts.test: npm run test -w @podchody/server && npm run test -w @podchody/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @podchody/server && npm run typecheck -w @podchody/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
